content.en:
The Extreme Dao inheritance is very complete, and it can be said that only if you have enough talent, enough potential, and enough resources, you can step into the Extreme Dao realm.

Other Invincible Dao Ancestors couldn't cultivate to the Extreme Dao realm, but Ye Tian felt that he should be fine.

Moreover, the black wood he obtained this time was a top-level forbidden treasure level spirit root wood, and it was the top-notch kind, which could refine the forbidden body, even if it was a great achievement-level forbidden body, it had a strong tempering effect.

Otherwise, Ye Tian didn't know how many years it would take to raise the forbidden body to the Ten Percent Great Perfection realm.

However, he also knew very well that if others did not have the talent of copying, it would be too difficult to take the path of the extreme.

Even his relatives don't have much hope of taking the path of the extreme.

Therefore, he didn't plan to tell his relatives about the Extreme Path first, otherwise they would have to take the Extreme Path Path, resulting in nothing and even delaying their growth, so it would be unnecessary.

If in the future, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, his wife Xiao Yue and others have hope to take the path of the Extreme Dao, he will hand over the Extreme Dao inheritance to them.

Ye Tian took out the black wood and cut off a little wood chips, but it was ground into powder, so that it could be refined, otherwise it would be difficult to refine this black wood.

Rumble!!!

The powder was refined by Ye Tian and turned into an extremely pure energy, constantly refining Ye Tian's forbidden body.

Originally, Ye Tian's progress was very slow after reaching eighty percent, and he couldn't continue to refine his forbidden body with many forbidden strange things.

But now, after refining this black powder, Ye Tian's forbidden body began to improve, and the effect of refining was too good.

According to this refining effect, it won't be long before Ye Tian's forbidden body can reach the level of eighty percent.

Moreover, the forbidden Dao power is also being continuously refined, and the effect is very good.

In addition, the Extreme Dao Inheritance also has secret techniques that are specifically aimed at the purity of forbidden Dao power.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to refine his forbidden body and cultivate the secret technique of the Extreme Dao Inheritance, and the days passed very quickly.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's forbidden body had been tempered to the level of eighty percent and four, and the black wood had also been consumed to the extent of one thousandth.

It can be seen from this that the value of this piece of black wood is huge, and this piece of black wood is obviously a projection of some supreme treasure in the Dark Forbidden Realm, for example, that Peng Zu has a treasure similar to black wood, but the value of black wood is not known how many times higher.

"The forbidden body will become more and more difficult to refine to the back, this black wood should not be able to allow me to completely temper to the level of ten percent perfect forbidden body, in the future, I must find a more advanced cultivation type forbidden treasure to be able to make my forbidden body reach ten percent perfection!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian often entered the Wind Mountain to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue and comprehend the Forbidden Dao and the Endless Dao, so as to cultivate the Endless Dao to the limit as soon as possible, and thus step into the realm of the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

Once he stepped into the realm of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, his strength would be able to transform again, reaching a very terrifying level, and he would not have to worry about his own safety.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Blue Dragon Palace Lord were discussing a big matter, and that was a big matter against Black Wind Mountain.

Previously, Black Wind Mountain had robbed the Heavenly Emperor Palace many times, causing the Heavenly Emperor Palace to suffer a lot of losses.

Now, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master has stepped into the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level, so whether it is high-end combat power or heritage, the Heavenly Emperor Palace does not need to be afraid of Black Wind Mountain.

And this time, the topic they talked about was Ye Tian.

Ye Tian fought with a Dapeng projection creature comparable to a half-step domain ancestor in the large forbidden treasure land, showing terrifying combat power.

Even if Ye Tian was not as good as the real half-step domain ancestor, in fact, the gap was not big.

A Supreme Dao Ancestor is comparable to a half-step Domain Ancestor, what a terrible thing this is.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Blue Dragon Palace Lord had not heard of such a thing in the Divine Heaven Realm, so they were very jealous of Ye Tian.

"You must kill the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, otherwise once he steps into the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, it will be difficult to kill him again!" the Golden Crow Palace Lord proposed.

"That's right!" The Blue Dragon Palace Lord nodded: "His Dao is very powerful, it is estimated that it will be difficult to reach the extreme level, it will take a long time, but it is impossible for us to give him any more time." Before, he wasn't very strong, so we didn't pay enough attention. But now we must pay attention to it, otherwise once he rises completely, it will pose a great threat to our Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord kept looking at the information about Ye Tian, and then said coldly: "Judging from the intelligence, it is very likely that the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is the same person as the Dark King, and the Dark King is likely to be the previous Nine Extremes Heavenly King. You said before that it was impossible for the Nine Extremes Heavenly King to grow so fast, and you thought that the Dark King was one of the ancient Ten Kings, but in fact, your information was wrong! Even the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor could grow so fast, and the Nine Extremes Heavenly King could naturally grow so fast!"

"But the Dark King and the Nine Extremes Heavenly King appeared at the same time, and the Dark King doesn't look like a clone!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord frowned.

"What do you know? The Dark Forbidden Realm doesn't know how many secrets I don't know, in case there are any special clone talents, it's not strange at all!" The Golden Crow Palace Lord said, "We can't track the whereabouts of the Dark King, but the whereabouts of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors are easy to trace. I suggest that the attack on the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor be launched immediately, once the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is killed, it will inevitably cause huge losses to the Black Wind Mountain. But we only have one chance to attack, otherwise once the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor finds out, it will be difficult to kill him again!"

"Who will you send?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord hesitated.

"You go personally!" The Golden Crow Palace Master ordered: "The combat power of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is close to that of a weaker half-step Domain Ancestor, and it will be difficult for other Palace Masters to attack the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, and it will be difficult to kill him." And your strength is qualified to kill the weaker half-step domain ancestor, plus the combination of several other half-step palace masters, you should be able to kill the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor in a short period of time. As for me, I am responsible for intercepting the half-step domain ancestor who came to the rescue of Black Wind Mountain. If necessary, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master will also take action. If you kill one Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors this time, and then kill a few half-step Domain Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, it will really be perfect!"

"Then let's do it this way!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord agreed.

However, the Heavenly Emperor Palace never waited for the right opportunity.

Over the years, Ye Tian had been cultivating in the Wind Mountain or the Human Realm, and the Human Realm was a medium-sized forbidden void realm, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestors had no way to invade it, so they had no way to launch an attack, so they could only slowly look for an opportunity.
